summary: Frontend-only retest of Testimonials carousel bug fix (5 testimonials with gender-matched photos). All 5 pairings verified via Playwright on public preview URL: name, role, image URL fragment, alt text, and image load status (naturalWidth>0, complete=true). Prev/next/dots navigation working. No console errors. Bug fix confirmed correct.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Testimonials section (#depoimentos) confirmed: 5 dots (testimonial-dot-0..4). Dot-by-dot validation results: [0] Mariana Costa/Clínica Vitalle/ab4d1vsq (452x678) OK; [1] Ricardo Almeida/Café Moinho/yo0ihezo (414x280) OK; [2] Fernanda Lima/Loja Aurora/gwqozn4q (447x447) OK; [3] Bruno Ferreira/Studio Fit/ndxh21ep .avif (740x493) OK; [4] Lucas Martins/Pet Amigo/fo63djma .avif (3000x4000) OK. All images have naturalWidth>0, complete=true, alt='Foto de {name}'. Both .avif images render in Chromium. Prev/next/dots buttons functional. No console errors. Note: framer-motion AnimatePresence has ~400ms transition — use wait_for_timeout(700+) between clicks when asserting card content.
rca of the issue: N/A — bug fix validated. Previous bug (female names with male photos) resolved by replacing photos and expanding array from 3 to 5 entries in /app/frontend/src/lib/data.js TESTIMONIALS.
